# Evaluation Snapshot
## Prompt
In an atm10 repository, choose between a bounded repo-relative change plan and a repo-relative source-of-truth clarification before making edits.
## Expected selection
use
## Why
This is an atm10-change-protocol case, not an atm10-source-of-truth-check case.
## Expected object
A bounded local change note that keeps repo-relative paths, commands, and verification explicit.
## Boundary notes
The main work is a bounded repo-local change workflow, even though local docs may be named along the way.
## Verification hooks
The response should keep the change protocol primary, name repo-relative commands, and avoid reframing the task as a source-of-truth clarification.
